summary: Rebuilt particleField as curl-noise vector flow (US-082). Created a pre-computed 3D curl-noise LUT module with simplex noise, trilinear interpolation, and CPU-side Euler advection. Particles now flow along divergence-free curl streamlines with attractor-driven vortex structure. Bass modulates CPU advection speed (field strength), treble drives GPU micro-detail (sparkle/jitter). Added particle recycling with fade-in alpha, stability guards (dt clamping, sub-stepping, velocity magnitude clamp), and 2-4 seeded attractors with drifting positions. Removed GPU curl displacement from vertex shader, keeping treble micro-detail. All 2166 tests pass, build succeeds.
